mapper.select: select count(*) from `gas_station_sale_data` where `user_id` = #{userId} and `effective` = true
mapper.update: update `gas_station_sale_data` set `effective` = FALSE where `batch` = (select `a`.`max` from (select max(`batch`) as `max` from `gas_station_sale_data` where `effective` = TRUE) as `a` );
